title: Cardano at TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026: Top-Up ‘Title’ Sponsorship Upgrade

rationale.summary: Vote: ABSTAIN. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (expired), evidence quality was insufficient for a reliable YES or NO decision. Decisive reason: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "Modular top-up unlocks the ‘ Title’ Sponsorship tier, the highest level of visibility at TOKEN2049." though 8 review blocker(s) remain open. sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Cardano at TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026: Top-Up ‘Title’ Sponsorship Upgrade
Stated amount: not stated in document

Deliverables: Modular top-up unlocks the ‘ Title’ Sponsorship tier, the highest level of visibility at TOKEN2049., This is an incremental request of 1,768,167 ada (equivalent to $424,360 USD, calculated at an estimated rate of $0.24 per ada) to upgrade Cardano’s presence from a 108 sqm booth to a massive 144 sqm footprint and secure a Mainstage Keynote., Dependency Notice: This is a top-up proposal intended to be voted on in conjunction with the Cardano at TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026: Baseline ‘Platinum’ Sponsorship proposal (Gov Action ID: gov action18u8lpkzge2csxe3plynn9lh4agwtv3nrqkyfwalwj4ykjv7l68jqqzmul9z)., If this proposal is ratified without the approval of the ‘Platinum’ Sponsorship proposal, EMURGO commits to returning 100% of the funds to the Cardano Treasury within 30 days of enactment, as there would be no underlying sponsorship to upgrade.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Modular top-up unlocks the ‘ Title’ Sponsorship tier, the highest level of visibility at TOKEN2049.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This is an incremental request of 1,768,167 ada (equivalent to $424,360 USD, calculated at an estimated rate of $0.24 per ada) to upgrade Cardano’s presence from a 108 sqm booth to a massive 144 sqm footprint and secure a Mainstage Keynote.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Dependency Notice: This is a top-up proposal intended to be voted on in conjunction with the Cardano at TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026: Baseline ‘Platinum’ Sponsorship proposal (Gov Action ID: gov action18u8lpkzge2csxe3plynn9lh4agwtv3nrqkyfwalwj4ykjv7l68jqqzmul9z).

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): If this proposal is ratified without the approval of the ‘Platinum’ Sponsorship proposal, EMURGO commits to returning 100% of the funds to the Cardano Treasury within 30 days of enactment, as there would be no underlying sponsorship to upgrade.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Empowering Builders on the Global Stage TOKEN2049 Singapore represents the most significant opportunity of the year to showcase the vibrancy of the Cardano ecosystem.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): The core motivation of this proposal is to provide Cardano builders with a professional, high-traffic platform to demonstrate their innovations.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Risk review

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "Modular top-up unlocks the ‘ Title’ Sponsorship tier, the highest level of visibility at TOKEN2049." though 8 review blocker(s) remain open.
Strongest NO: an unresolved blocker (treasury_amount_lovelace is missing for a treasury withdrawal) means costs or weak controls may outweigh the claimed benefit.
Strongest hold: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.
